title: 2023 Refresh of Action Plan for Pacific Education - Ministry of Education
content:
Te Whakahou i te Mahere Mahi mō te Mātauranga o Te Moana-nui-a-Kiwa

## 2023 Refresh of Action Plan for Pacific Education
The 2023 Refresh of Action Plan for Pacific Education was released on 12 July 2023 by the Ministry of Education.
The 2023 Refresh of Action Plan for Pacific Education was released on 12 July 2023 by the Ministry of Education. Further information on the Action Plan can be found here:
Action Plan for Pacific Education
The documents below are the advice we provided to Ministers related to the refresh of the Action Plan.
